task:
In the Blender file open at /home/user/Documents/shapekeys_scene.blend, on the default Cube add shape keys in this order: 'Basis', then 'Squash', then 'Stretch' (names must match exactly).

Set both 'Squash' and 'Stretch' to slider Min = -1 and Max = 2. Set the current value of 'Squash' to 0.7 and 'Stretch' to 0.3. Save the file.

verification.eval: any(k['name']=='Squash' and abs(k['value']-0.7)<0.02 and abs(k['slider_min']-(-1.0))<0.02 and abs(k['slider_max']-2.0)<0.02 for k in result.get('keys',[]))
any(k['name']=='Stretch' and abs(k['value']-0.3)<0.02 and abs(k['slider_min']-(-1.0))<0.02 and abs(k['slider_max']-2.0)<0.02 for k in result.get('keys',[]))
